feature_name: Homepage mission reset and simplified waitlist flow
scope_summary: Restore homepage to mission-first messaging without preview CTA buttons, add explicit legal-safe boundaries, lightly introduce modes/node tracking language, and simplify signup into a single waitlist form with a thank-you state for repeat visitors.

legal_and_regulatory.rationale: Copy now clearly scopes the product as in-development productivity support and avoids regulated clinical claims.
evidence: index.html legal boundary section explicitly states no diagnosis/treatment/care
contact.html legal boundary text warns against submitting sensitive medical or crisis information

privacy_local_first_promise.rationale: Waitlist handling uses explicit consent checkbox and no hidden data collection; only a localStorage boolean is used for duplicate thank-you UX.
evidence: contact.html waitlist form requires consent_to_process
contact.html stores only divergify_waitlist_joined in localStorage

medical_scope_and_claims.rationale: Language is bounded to productivity support and explicitly excludes diagnosis, treatment, and clinical services.
evidence: index.html legal and safety boundaries section
contact.html legal boundary paragraph

behavioral_science_alignment.rationale: Homepage reduces cognitive load and hype by removing preview CTA clutter and focusing on clear mission framing.
evidence: index.html removes scaffold preview tool and CTA button block
index.html uses concise sectioning for mission, build status, and safety

neurodivergence_research_alignment.rationale: Copy centers state-aware support, friction reduction, and non-shaming language consistent with ND-support design intent.
evidence: index.html describes mode matching, node tracking, and temporal context
index.html avoids cure/fix framing

user_benefit_and_harm_check.rationale: Users get clearer orientation, lower-friction signup, and stronger safety disclosures; foreseeable harm from overclaiming is reduced.
evidence: contact.html single-form waitlist with thank-you state
index.html mission-first copy and explicit safety boundaries

brand_voice_and_claims.rationale: Tone is direct and human without marketing-style pressure while still inviting hub/waitlist/store participation.
evidence: index.html section 'Join the build, not a pitch funnel'
partials/header.html and assets/site.js rename nav item from Contact to Waitlist

accessibility_and_inclusion.rationale: Form labels are explicit, keyboard-native controls are preserved, and copy is chunked into shorter sections.
evidence: contact.html waitlist inputs include associated labels
assets/global.css adds focused input styles and readable consent layout

security_and_reliability.rationale: Changes are static-content and CSS updates with no new privileged scripts or backend behavior.
evidence: No dependency or build pipeline changes
No auth, secret, or server endpoint modifications

monetization_and_dark_pattern_check.rationale: Store support language is transparent and optional; no coercive UX pattern or gated functionality introduced.
evidence: index.html store mention is plain-text invitation
No paywall or forced conversion components added

ship_decision.conditions: Ship now; monitor live submissions to confirm the waitlist thank-you state works across browsers.
